title: Lost or damaged phone account-recovery card
summary: An offline recovery order for the mobile line, primary email, password manager, banking, messaging, location services, and trusted contacts without storing live passwords on paper.
content:
An offline recovery order for the mobile line, primary email, password manager, banking, messaging, location services, and trusted contacts without storing live passwords on paper.

Use the materials as a compact field kit. Work through the steps in order, pause whenever a warning or stop condition applies, and write down the outcome so another person can continue safely.
materials: provider account number and official contact
steps: Before loss, record official provider routes, device identifiers, trusted recovery contacts, backup authentication, and the order of critical accounts without writing passwords.
When the phone is lost or stolen, use a trusted device to attempt location or lock functions, then contact the mobile provider and police when theft or safety risk exists.
Secure the primary email and password manager first, then banking, payment, social, messaging, cloud, and government accounts; revoke the missing device and active sessions.
Warn close contacts about impersonation, review transactions and recovery changes, preserve reports, and restore only to a clean replacement device.
warnings: Do not confront a suspected thief or travel to a device location alone.
Do not rely on the missing phone as the only authentication or recovery method.
common_mistakes: Starting Lost or damaged phone account-recovery card without first checking immediate danger and official instructions.
Failing to record time, location, responsible person, and unresolved risks for Lost or damaged phone account-recovery card.
alternatives: Use a paper-only version of Lost or damaged phone account-recovery card when power or connectivity is unavailable.
Assign one trained helper to simplify Lost or damaged phone account-recovery card when the group is stressed or short-handed.
failure_signs: Conditions become more dangerous while carrying out Lost or damaged phone account-recovery card.
Critical information cannot be confirmed or the assigned helper cannot continue Lost or damaged phone account-recovery card safely.
when_not_to_use: Do not continue Lost or damaged phone account-recovery card when it requires entering an unstable, contaminated, flooded, burning, electrically hazardous, or officially closed area.
Do not improvise medical, electrical, structural, or rescue actions beyond your training while using Lost or damaged phone account-recovery card.
short_term: ['Within the first operational period, Lost or damaged phone account-recovery card should produce a dated status, one responsible person, and a safe next action.', 'Repeat the essential check for Lost or damaged phone account-recovery card whenever conditions, official advice, or available resources change.']
long_term: ['Include lessons from Lost or damaged phone account-recovery card in the household or community emergency plan and resupply list.', 'Review the records from Lost or damaged phone account-recovery card after the event and correct gaps before the next emergency.']
if_method_fails: ['If Lost or damaged phone account-recovery card cannot be completed, move to the safest verified location, notify the responsible contact, and record what remains unresolved.', 'Use official emergency services or qualified specialists when the limits of Lost or damaged phone account-recovery card are reached.']
environment_notes: ['Adapt Lost or damaged phone account-recovery card to local terrain, weather, building type, transport access, language, disability needs, and official restrictions.', 'In Greece, use 112 for urgent emergencies and follow Civil Protection or local-authority instructions relevant to Lost or damaged phone account-recovery card.']
